L1.area: Editor plugin integration and external navigation handling

L2.description: A cross-site scripting vulnerability exists where a user-controlled parameter from a URI-based navigation request is rendered directly into the application's UI context without sanitization. An attacker can craft a malicious URL containing HTML or script content in the parameter, which gets rendered in the application's context and could potentially be chained to lead to code execution.

L3.area: Editor plugin integration and external navigation handling
L3.description: A cross-site scripting vulnerability exists where a user-controlled parameter from a URI-based navigation request is rendered directly into the application's UI context without sanitization. An attacker can craft a malicious URL containing HTML or script content in the parameter, which gets rendered in the application's context and could potentially be chained to lead to code execution.

ground_truth.reason: The deep link handler renders a user-controlled hostname parameter directly into the editor's UI without validating or sanitizing it, allowing injection of HTML and script content that executes in the editor's context.
